content.speakerText: So you're all set with your four classes? Anything else I can help with?
content.speakerTextCn: 你四门课都定好了吗？还有别的需要帮忙的吗？

options.text: Yes, I'm good! Thanks so much for your help!
I don't know yet, can we talk tomorrow?
Actually, I need more classes, can you add them?
Thanks, but I think I'll call someone else.

content.explanation: 正确答案是礼貌确认已完成并表达感谢，符合道别确认场景。选项2表示不确定，不适合结束对话；选项3是新增请求，不符合‘确认结束’语境；选项4有负面暗示，不礼貌。

content.speakerText: I've got everything I need for my visa application. Thank you for all your guidance!
content.speakerTextCn: 我的签证申请材料都准备好了，非常感谢你的指导！

options.text: You're welcome! Let me know if anything changes.
Oh, I forgot to mention the bank statement.
Why did you wait until now to say thank you?
I'm busy now, can we talk later?

content.explanation: 正确答案是专业且温暖的结束回应，符合顾问角色。选项2引入新信息，破坏了‘结束对话’的语境；选项3和4不礼貌，不符合服务场景的礼仪。

content.speakerText: I'm all set with my housing and registration. You've been incredibly helpful!
content.speakerTextCn: 我的住宿和注册都搞定了，你真的帮了大忙！

options.text: I'm glad I could help! Have a great start to your semester!
Yeah, it was easy. You should have asked earlier.
Can you send me a review of my file?

content.explanation: 正确答案既回应了感谢，又表达了美好祝愿，自然得体。选项2语气生硬且指责对方，不符合服务礼仪；选项3是新请求，不适合道别；选项4过于简短，缺乏礼貌和温度。

content.template: I'm all set! Thanks so much for your help — you ______ me!
content.hint: 口语中表达‘你救了我’的常用表达

content.template: Could you please ______ me the course codes? I'd like to double-check them.
content.hint: 请求书面确认时的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频动词：email（用于正式确认）

content.template: Thanks for all your ______ — I couldn't have done this without you.
content.hint: 感谢顾问时最贴切的名词，强调专业建议
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心搭配：thanks for your guidance

content.speakerText: So you're all set with your four classes? Anything else I can help with?
content.speakerTextCn: 你四门课都定好了吗？还有别的需要帮忙的吗？
expectedAnswers: Yep, I'm good! Thanks so much for your help!
All set — thank you! Could you email me the course codes for my records?
I appreciate your help. Everything looks perfect, and I'll reach out if anything changes.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表示已完成并结束对话
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否使用地道口语表达（如 'I'm good', 'all set'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'thanks', 'help', 'course codes' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I've finished all the steps for my student visa. Thank you for walking me through everything!
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经完成了学生签证的所有步骤，谢谢你一步步指导我！
expectedAnswers: You're so welcome! I'm glad everything worked out.
That's great to hear! Don't hesitate to contact me if you need help once you arrive.
Happy to help! Wishing you a smooth transition and an amazing experience abroad.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应感谢并提供温暖结束语
语言准确性：使用恰当的感谢回应结构（You're welcome, I'm glad...）
表达自然度：是否使用符合顾问身份的自然表达（如 'don't hesitate', 'wishing you'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'thank you', 'help', 'experience', 'contact' 等关键词

content.speakerText: I've confirmed my housing and course schedule. I really appreciate your support.
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经确认了住宿和课程安排，非常感谢你的支持。
expectedAnswers: It was my pleasure! You're all set for a successful semester.
Thank you for your kind words — I'm here if you need anything else later.
Great job! Remember to check your university portal for updates.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应感谢并强化积极结束感
语言准确性：使用正确时态和礼貌结构（It was my pleasure, I'm here if...）
表达自然度：是否避免机械重复，有个性化表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'appreciate', 'support', 'set', 'update' 等场景关键词
